title: SuppressionEntry
description: A suppressed recipient. The canonical match key is `email_sha256` (sha256 of the lowercased, trimmed address) so suppression can be enforced and exported WITHOUT storing raw PII in logs (NO_PII). A raw `email` may exist only in the live operational store and must never be written to logs or committed.

email.description: Operational-only raw address; never log or commit (NO_PII).
